pages.title: About Me
pages.description: About Ash Marshall — UK-based filmmaker and Multimedia Production Manager.

blocks.label: About section
blocks.heading: About Me
blocks.body:
Multimedia Production Manager and filmmaker based in the UK. I create cinematic, people-centred stories for brands and partners across EMEA — from concept to delivery.

Comfortable on location or in the edit suite, I blend practical production with design sensitivity to deliver reliable, on-brand content.
